lineage.Process: UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\richard.gibbs\Downloads\Pacific_D-Flow_freshwater_Inflows_Outflows</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Pacific_Missing_Inflows_D-Flow.shp</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>Id</field_name></DeleteField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>comment</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\richard.gibbs\Downloads\Pacific_D-Flow_freshwater_Inflows_Outflows</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Pacific_Missing_Inflows_D-Flow.shp</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>Id</field_name></DeleteField></workflow></operationSequence>

SpatialJoin Pacific_Missing_Inflows_D-Flow pac_reference_nhdhr_flowpaths C:\Users\richard.gibbs\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\PacNextGenInflows\PacNextGenInflows.gdb\Pacific_Missing__SpatialJoin "Join one to one" KEEP_ALL "comment "comment" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Pacific_Missing_Inflows_D-Flow,comment,0,254;id "id" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,pac_reference_nhdhr_flowpaths,id,-1,-1;vpuID "vpuID" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,pac_reference_nhdhr_flowpaths,vpuID,0,254;domain "domain" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,pac_reference_nhdhr_flowpaths,domain,0,254" Intersect "0.5 Meters" #
DeleteField Pacific_Missing__SpatialJoin Join_Count "Delete Fields"
DeleteField Pacific_Missing__SpatialJoin TARGET_FID "Delete Fields"

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\richard.gibbs\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\PacNextGenInflows\PacNextGenInflows.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Pacific_Missing__SpatialJoin</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>FlowDir</field_name><field_type>SHORT</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField Pacific_Missing__SpatialJoin FlowDir 1 "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

Merge Pacific_Missing__SpatialJoin;Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQC CalculateGeometryAttributes Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed "long POINT_X;lat POINT_Y" # # GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] "Same as input"
CalculateField Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed hl_link ""PacDflow" + str(!OBJECTID!)" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

ExportFeatures Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed C:\Users\richard.gibbs\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\PacNextGenInflows\PacNextGenInflows.gdb\Pac_dflow_InflowsOutflows # NOT_USE_ALIAS "id "id" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,id,-1,-1;vpuID "vpuID" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,vpuID,0,254;domain "domain" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,domain,0,254;FlowDir "FlowDir" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,FlowDir,-1,-1;START_X "START_X" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,START_X,-1,-1;START_Y "START_Y" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,START_Y,-1,-1;END_X "END_X" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,END_X,-1,-1;END_Y "END_Y" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,END_Y,-1,-1;start_DomL "start_DomL" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,start_DomL,0,254;end_DomLoc "end_DomLoc" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,end_DomLoc,0,254;multInt "multInt" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,multInt,-1,-1;long "long" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,long,-1,-1;lat "lat" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,lat,-1,-1;hl_link "hl_link" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,hl_link,0,254;comment "comment" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,comment,0,254;action "action" true true false 8000 Text 0 0,First,#,Pacific_dflowfreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed,action,0,8000" #
JoinField Pac_dflow_InflowsOutflows hl_link conus_nextgen_hydrolocations hl_link poi_id "Select transfer fields" #
DeleteField Pac_dflow_InflowsOutflows id;START_X;START_Y;END_X;END_Y "Delete Fields"
JoinField Pac_dflow_InflowsOutflows poi_id conus_nextgen_pois poi_id id;nex_id "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField Pac_dflow_InflowsOutflows id conus_nextgen_flowpaths id START_X;START_Y;END_X;END_Y;order "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField Pac_dflow_InflowsOutflows id conus_nextgen_flowpath_attributes link TopWdth;TopWdthCC "Select transfer fields" #
CalculateField Pac_dflow_InflowsOutflows start_DomL "o" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField Pac_dflow_InflowsOutflows end_DomLoc "i" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CalculateGeometryAttributes Pac_dflow_InflowsOutflows "long POINT_X;lat POINT_Y" # # GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] "Same as input"

CalculateGeometryAttributes Pac_dflow_InflowsOutflows "long POINT_X;lat POINT_Y" # # GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] "Same as input"

CalculateGeometryAttributes Pac_dflow_InflowsOutflows "long POINT_X;lat POINT_Y" # # GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] "Same as input"
